title: PoJo Optimizer
description: An optimization modpack built for Mojo, Pojav, or Zanith
body:
**⚠️ UPDATE COMING WITH EVEN BETTER OPTIMIZATION AND CUSTOM CONFIG ⚠️**

---

PoJo Optimizer is a modpack that contains 23 mods that _specifically target performance_. It's fully client-side, and doesn't changes how the game feels, instead it can get you **over 3X FPS**

❓ **Why should I use PoJo Optimizer instead of Simply Optimized ?**

_Potato Optmizer contains more mods, while still having only 21. These were carefully chosen to optimize minecraft in almost any situations. Plus, tests have been made, with Simply Optmized, you get mostly 70 FPS with lag spikes (90 hz refresh rate), but with PoJo Optimizer, the frames are constantly at 90 fps. Plus, it was built for Mojo Launcher (pojav), zanith launcher or any java for android launcher._

**In conclusion, if you want easy FPS on Android, definitaly try PoJo Optimizer.**

---

All mods will be listed and explained down below :


⛰️ **ImmediatelyFast**
Improves the immediate mode rendering performance of the client.

🏃‍♂️ **ModernFix**
Improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs.

🔇 **Stfu**
Silences annoying or useless log messages to keep your console clean.

💎 **Clumps**
Merges XP orbs together to reduce lag and improve performance in farms.

🌐 **Krypton**
Optimizes Minecraft’s networking stack for better server and multiplayer performance.

👀 **MoreCulling**
Adds aggressive block face culling to reduce rendering load and boost FPS.

📦 **Packet Fixer**
Fixes packet-related issues and improves network reliability in certain situations.

💡 **ScalableLux**
Enhances lighting performance and scalability, especially useful on low-end devices.

🗺️ **C2ME**
Speeds up chunk loading and world generation using multi-threading.

📉 **Dynamic FPS**
Reduces FPS when the game is unfocused or idle to save battery and heat.

🪶 **Lithium**
General-purpose optimization mod improving game logic, physics, and AI performance.

🖼️ **Super Resolution**
Allow for custom game resolution (lower resolution ➙ higher FPS).

🐞 **Debugify**
Fixes many vanilla bugs that Mojang hasn’t addressed yet.

🧩 **FNP Patcher**
Applies compatibility and performance patches.

🪎 **Better Block Entities (BBE)**
Improves the rendering of block entities (like chests and signs) to boost performance without reducing visual quality.

🧱 **FerriteCore**
Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways.

➗ **SuperFastMath**
Replaces math operations with faster implementations to slightly boost performance.

🧊 **BadOptimizations**
A collection of mostly micro optimizations that add up to something bigger.

🔥 **Sodium**
Major rendering engine replacement that drastically increases FPS.

👁️ **EntityCulling**
Stops rendering entities that aren’t visible, improving performance.

🌊 **ZFastNoise**
Optimizes noise generation used in terrain and world generation.
